title: habenaria albida
intro: Habenaria albida, also known as the white beard orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include treating fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing inflammation. The plant is commonly prepared for medicinal use in the form of decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are believed to provide relief from various health issues.
